beats.activity: Wake up, feed sourdough starter, make coffee, light breakfast
beats.reasoning: Sunday morning ritual—sourdough starter is part of Maren's grounding routine, especially after a 50/100 energy day yesterday. Calm start to a sunny day.

beats.activity: Commute to Lake Union for morning kayak
beats.reasoning: Perfect weather (72F, sunny) and low energy yesterday mean today is ideal for the kayaking trip Maren was planning last night. Gas Works Park offers easy launch access and parking.
Heavy afternoon paddle traffic predicted, so morning launch avoids crowds. Maren loves kayaking and needs restorative time after recent work stress; three hours allows for a full, meandering paddle.

beats.activity: Paddle back, load kayak, grab coffee at lakeside café
beats.reasoning: Light post-kayak refuel before heading out; Molly Moon's is near Gas Works and offers a casual, nourishing stop.
Sunday midday commute back home to prepare lunch and catch up on personal tasks; light traffic expected.

beats.activity: Lunch prep, check sourdough, tend to starter
beats.reasoning: Maren's sourdough starter needs attention mid-day. She'll prepare a leisurely lunch and tend to her baking schedule while relaxing at home.

beats.activity: Errand: grocery run for fresh produce and baking supplies
beats.reasoning: Sunny Sunday afternoon is good for a quick, focused errand. Maren picks up fresh herbs, flour, and produce for the week ahead; keeps spreadsheet of expenses accurate.
Short drive back to Redmond home; unload and organize groceries for the week.

beats.activity: Sourdough prep: shape dough, set up for tomorrow's bake
beats.reasoning: Afternoon light is still good; Maren shapes her sourdough for an overnight proof, enjoying the meditative rhythm of baking before evening sets in.

beats.activity: Dinner prep and meal with book
beats.reasoning: Cook a real dinner with fresh herbs from today's errand; settle in with a book and quiet time as evening approaches, mirroring yesterday's peaceful wind-down.

beats.activity: Evening leisure: reading, light tidying, prep for the week ahead
beats.reasoning: Maren settles into a low-key evening—reviewing her expense spreadsheet, planning the week, and winding down naturally as Sunday transitions to night.
Full 8-hour sleep cycle, ending well before 06:00 Monday, allowing Maren to wake early for her weekday sourdough routine and commute to Ballard.

world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
